---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: carrilloapps
---

## Summary

A concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed behavior

Describe how the feature should work, including any new CLI flags, commands, or output format changes.

```bash
# Example usage
zefer <new-command> [options]
```

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context

Links to related issues, the zefer web app equivalent, or any other relevant context.
